title: エリザベス女王杯の後に・らしくない

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The Queen Elizabeth II Cup has come to a close!
This year's queen has been decided!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...It's over.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, please give a big round of applause for
our new queen!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The Queen Elizabeth II Cup was the stage I always
dreamed of...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: But I wasn't able to win, and now it's over.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I tried. I really gave it all I had.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But it wasn't enough... I finally reached the race I
always dreamed of, and I just...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
choice_data_list:
As long as you never give up, you'll definitely
be able to win.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Right. You're... right!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A princess never gives up. I won't stop until I
become my ideal self.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Next time I race here, I'll claim the victory I
dreamed of!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Kawakami Princess's request, we look out over
the track from the stands until it's time for the
concert.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It was only a short time ago I was running along
this track...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What're you spacing out for?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Sweep?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
First, I'll say this—I'm entering both the Victoria
Mile and the Queen Elizabeth II Cup next year.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You should enter too, if you want. Even after our
classic year is over, we can still compete in our
senior year.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...I know.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Trainer. I want to decide my next objective.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
So that I can enter this race again... So that I can
become a princess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once winter is over, Kawakami Princess's senior
year will begin. To support her development, I
should set her an objective prior to the G1 spring
season.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A medium-distance G2 race on turf. It takes place
in March, so she should be able to handle it no
matter which G1 race she wants to enter during
the spring season.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Right. Roger that! Let's put together a training
regimen once we get back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Lady in a Dress
text_block_list.text: Murmur...

text_block_list.name: Lady with Hat
text_block_list.text: Murmur...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Kawakami Princess suddenly stops in her tracks.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Um. Oh, it's nothing...

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Here you are! I have something to discuss
regarding the concert rehearsal...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, between the rehearsal and then the
concert afterwards, I never find a chance to ask
her about what made her stop so suddenly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after returning to my office, Kawakami
Princess is still...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
choice_data_list: Let's have our meeting tomorrow instead.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: N-no, today's fine! I'd rather have it now...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: It'll keep my mind from wandering to other things.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzz... Bzzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's my phone. The name that appears on the
screen is that of the TV producer we spoke to
during the Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh—you're getting a call! Go ahead and answer
it. I'll just wait over here.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course! Go ahead! We can start the
meeting once you're done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle...

text_block_list.name: Lady in a Dress
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, it's that Kawakami Princess. Do you
suppose she's actually friends with Sweep Tosho?

text_block_list.name: Lady with Hat
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, that would explain quite a bit. She was so
self-centered during the Japanese Oaks and
Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Lady in a Dress
text_block_list.text:
Unquestionably. She doesn't act like her name in
the slightest. I'm glad she wasn't the one who
became queen.

text_block_list.name: Lady with Hat
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, surely fate has frowned upon her. She's not
fit to be a queen.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm not fit to be a queen... That's why fate has
frowned upon me.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No... I need to snap myself out of this funk! A real
princess wouldn't let this bother her! I can't... let
this...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Arrgh! Hmph! Yaaah! Hah! Hup!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: HIIIYAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thump! Rattle! Craaash! Flutter!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Uwah?! Ack, did I hit that box?! All the
documents are—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh no... I have to tidy all this up before Trainer
gets back...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? This is...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, Trainer! ...Oh? Why do you look so
flustered?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Come ooon, you should know that a princess is
very perceptive! I'll have to pretend I didn't see
anything. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You actually prepared a surprise present for when
I win the Queen Elizabeth II Cup. ♪ That's my
trainer—so considerate. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This is... the surprise present Trainer was hiding
from me before.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Glances around nervously...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer... but I could really use this
pick-me-up right now.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
When the big reveal happens, I'll just act
surprised like I never saw it before.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...Letters? And they're addressed to both Trainer
and me. There are so many—even more than the
fan letters I get.
